title: RBI (Commercial Banks Cash Reserve Ratio & Statutory Liquidity Ratio) Second Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI has granted CRR and SLR exemption on eligible FCNR(B) deposits mobilized until September 30, 2026. The move is aimed at attracting foreign currency funds and strengthening banking sector liquidity.
The post RBI (Commercial Banks Cash Reserve Ratio & Statutory Liquidity Ratio) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
